_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in transformation analytics (e.g., aggregation, enrichment, processing).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing well-structured, tested, and documented SQL transformations that produce reliable, reusable datasets for analytics consumers.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-007 (DA, cosine: 0.572), LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.569).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.628). Shared vocabulary: [analytics, skill]. DCWF-only terms [aggregation, enrichment, processing, transformation] vs WIDAI-only terms [consumers, datasets, documented, produce, reliable, reusable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.876, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in transformation analytics (e.g., aggregation, enrichment, processing)." and "Skill in writing well-structured, tested, and documented SQL transformations tha" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.604 ≈ STS 0.628 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analytics, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [analytics, skill]. DCWF-only: [aggregation, enrichment, processing, transformation]. WIDAI-only: [consumers, datasets, documented, produce, reliable, reusable].
